overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player character walks from beneath a highway overpass, crosses a sunlit intersection, and continues along an industrial street lined with overhead pipes and power infrastructure on a clear afternoon.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass approach with mega skyscraper view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the road beneath the elevated highway ramp toward the distant intersection

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving past the player on the right side of the road

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel highway structure with green painted beams casting shadows
tall futuristic skyscraper with red structural accents and large digital billboard
tall concrete wall with vegetation on top running alongside the road
silver metal guardrail with red and white striped barriers
dense network of electrical wires crisscrossing between utility poles

segments.scene_description: The segment opens beneath a massive elevated highway ramp, walking along an asphalt road toward a towering skyscraper in the distance. The concrete retaining wall and metal guardrail line the left side while power lines crisscross overhead. A sedan passes by on the right as the player approaches an intersection.

events.description: stepping onto the crosswalk and crossing the intersection while traffic waits
turning left at the intersection to proceed down Cordwainer street

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and turning left onto the sidewalk, navigating around pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing waiting at the crosswalk corner
black van driving through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: tall pole with horizontal traffic signal arms extending over the street
painted white zebra stripes marking the pedestrian crossing
orange rectangular street sign with 'Cordwainer' text mounted on a pole
low-rise concrete building covered in colorful graffiti and street art

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from under the overpass into a wide sunlit intersection, crossing the street at the marked crosswalk. After turning left onto Cordwainer street, the orange street sign becomes visible while industrial buildings with graffiti line the right side. Pedestrians wait at the corners and vehicles navigate the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with overhead utility infrastructure

events.description: passing beneath large overhead industrial pipes spanning the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete sidewalk past industrial warehouses and graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: person in brown coat walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large diameter metal pipes supported by steel trusses spanning across the street
tall electrical transmission towers with multiple high-voltage lines
large utilitarian building with loading docks and metal siding
concrete wall covered in blue and green spray paint tags and murals

segments.scene_description: Walking down Cordwainer street through an industrial district, the player passes beneath massive overhead pipes that span the roadway. Power transmission towers rise in the distance against the blue sky, while graffiti-covered walls and industrial warehouses line both sides of the concrete sidewalk. The area has a gritty, utilitarian atmosphere with minimal pedestrian activity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the shadowed depths of a highway overpass into a bright, gritty industrial district. It begins beneath a massive elevated ramp, moving along an asphalt road past concrete retaining walls and crisscrossing power lines toward a distant skyscraper. As the camera emerges from the shade, the scene opens into a wide, sunlit intersection where the player crosses a marked crosswalk and turns onto Cordwainer Street, passing orange signage and graffiti-covered buildings. The environment then shifts into a utilitarian industrial corridor, moving beneath heavy overhead pipes that span the roadway. Finally, the path leads past towering power transmission towers and warehouses under a clear blue sky, deepening the sense of urban decay.
